excerpt:
Rocky Mountain Area(PL 4)   
Fire Activity and Teams Assigned Totals 
New fires: 13 
New large incidents: 0 
Uncontained large fires: 7 
CIMTs Committed: 6 
 
Aspen Acres, Custer County. CIMT (NR Team 6). Twenty miles southwest of Pueblo, CO. Timber and grass. 
Moderate fire behavior with short crown runs, flanking and single tree torching. Numerous residences 
threatened. Evacuations, area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
Fishhook, Medicine Bow-Routt NF, USFS. CIMT (SW Team 1). Eight miles northwest of Steamboat Springs, 
CO. Timber and medium slash. Moderate fire behavior with group torching, short-range spotting and flanking. 
Structures threatened. Area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
Gold Mountain, Grand Mesa, Uncompahgre and Gunnison NF, USFS. CIMT (RM Team 2). Two miles north 
of Ouray, CO. Grass, brush and timber. Moderate fire behavior with flanking, backing and torching. Numerous 
structures and critical infrastructure threatened. Evacuations, area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
Elk, Grand Mesa, Uncompahgre and Gunnison NF, USFS. CIMT (NW Team 8). Seven miles northwest of 
Lake City, CO. Timber, heavy slash and grass. Active fire behavior with group torching and spotting. Numerous 
residences threatened. Evacuations, area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
Ferris, San Juan NF, USFS. CIMT (CA Team 7). Seven miles east of Cahone, CO. Timber and brush. Minimal 
fire behavior with backing, creeping and smoldering. Numerous structures and communication infrastructure 
threatened. Evacuations, area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
Willow, Pike and San Isabel NF, USFS. CIMT (CA Team 8). Six miles west of Leadville, CO. Brush, closed 
timber litter and timber. Moderate fire behavior with flanking and group torching. Numerous structures and 
critical infrastructure threatened. Evacuations, area, road and trail closures in effect. 
 
P L Gulch, White River Field Office, BLM. Nineteen miles southwest of Meeker, CO. Brush and grass. Active 
fire behavior with creeping, isolated torching and backing. Structures and energy infrastructure threatened. 
Road closures in effect.
